title: Statsig Feature Gate
description: A feature gate configuration that controls access to features based on targeting rules, conditions, and user properties. Feature gates are the core primitive for feature flagging in Statsig.

id.description: The unique identifier of the feature gate.

name.description: The name of the feature gate, used as the key for SDK evaluation.

description.description: A human-readable description of the gate's purpose and the feature it controls.

isEnabled.description: Whether the gate is currently enabled and actively evaluating rules. When disabled, the gate returns false for all users.

status.description: The current lifecycle status of the gate.

rules.description: The ordered list of targeting rules evaluated for this gate. Rules are evaluated top-to-bottom and the first matching rule determines the result.

tags.description: Tags for organizing and categorizing the gate.

targetApps.description: Target applications this gate is scoped to.

salt.description: Salt value used for deterministic user assignment hashing.

createdTime.description: Timestamp in milliseconds since epoch when the gate was created.

lastModifiedTime.description: Timestamp in milliseconds since epoch when the gate was last modified.

Rule.description: A targeting rule that defines conditions under which the gate passes or returns specific values.

id.description: The unique identifier of the rule.

name.description: A human-readable name for the rule.

passPercentage.description: The percentage of users matching conditions who pass the rule.

conditions.description: The conditions that must all be met for this rule to apply. Conditions within a rule are ANDed together.

returnValue.description: The value returned when this rule matches, used for dynamic configs.

environments.description: Environments where this rule is active (e.g., production, staging).

Condition.description: A condition within a targeting rule that evaluates user properties against specified criteria.

type.description: The type of condition to evaluate.

targetValue.description: The value or array of values to compare against.

field.description: The user field to evaluate, used with custom_field condition type.

Overrides.description: User and ID overrides that force specific evaluation results, bypassing normal rule evaluation.

value.description: The forced evaluation result for this user.

idOverrides.description: ID-based overrides for custom ID types.

value.description: The forced evaluation result for these IDs.
